basic_details.job_title: Greater Chennai Corporation Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Interns and Subject Matter Experts Posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Social Science or Urban Planning, Master’s Degree in Communication / Sociology / Social work or equivalent, Master’s Degree in Public Policy / Urban Planning or equivalent
qualification.details: Interns: Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Social Science or Urban Planning. Experience: 0-3 years. Communication, Consultation, Training Subject Matter Expert: Master’s Degree in Communication / Sociology / Social work or equivalent. Experience: 1-3 years. Policy Subject Matter Expert: Master’s Degree in Public Policy / Urban Planning or equivalent. Experience: 5-10 years.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Communication, Consultation, Training Subject Matter Expert

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Greater Chennai Corporation Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Greater Chennai Corporation Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Greater Chennai Corporation recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Greater Chennai Corporation recruitment is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Interns and Subject Matter Experts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the positions of Interns and Subject Matter Experts in the Greater Chennai Corporation recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Interns post?
faq.answer: For the Interns position, candidates should possess a Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Social Science or Urban Planning. Relevant experience can also be a factor.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process involves sending your complete application via email to the designated email address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for this Greater Chennai Corporation recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Interns and Subject Matter Experts in the Greater Chennai Corporation are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum experience required for the Policy Subject Matter Expert role?
faq.answer: For the Policy Subject Matter Expert role, candidates are expected to have 5 to 10 years of relevant experience in the field.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply?
faq.answer: The notification is for Greater Chennai Corporation, located in Tamil Nadu. While not explicitly stated, it's generally advisable for candidates to be aware of any location-specific requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Greater Chennai Corporation?
faq.answer: The official website of the Greater Chennai Corporation is www.chennaicorporation.gov.in. You can visit this site for more information.
